jcr:content.jcr:description: Learn how to apply for an AbbVie Independent Educational Grant through our four-step process.
jcr:content.jcr:title: How to Apply

block_1.name: Custom Title
block_1.title: How to Apply for an AbbVie Grant

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: Things to know before you apply

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text:
Consider the following items when submitting your application:

  • AbbVie has selected providers to be part of the AbbVie Independent Medical Education (IME) Provider Network. AbbVie will only consider grant requests submitted by providers who are part of the AbbVie IME Provider Network. Submissions from providers who are not part of the AbbVie IME Provider Network will no longer be considered for support.     
    • Please note: The AbbVie IME Provider Network does not apply to Independent Patient Education, Fellowships, or Call for Grants.
  • Your grant must be submitted at least 60 days prior to the decision requested by date.
  • You have the ability to track your request 24/7.
  • Your submission will be evaluated against predetermined criteria and must align with AbbVie's scientific areas of interest.
  • You will receive email notification from AbbVie if additional information is required.
  • You will receive AbbVie's decision via email. If approved, the authorized signer will receive required documentation (i.e., Letter of Agreement) electronically.
  • Grants must reconcile to the approved budget within 90 days following the grant end date.
  • Please reference the IME Outcomes Standardization Playbook for our requirements. This can be found on the AbbVie Grants Portal login page.

To start your grant request, go to grants.abbvie.com :abbvie-external-link:. For more details about the application process, see below:

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: All requests for funding must be submitted through our online portal, and at least 60 days before the start date of an activity.

item_2.name: Text Container Text
item_2.text:
• Register on behalf of the organization using our online portal. Previously registered users will need to confirm registration information at each submission.
  • Designate someone from the organization/department as a user and contact for the organization.
  • Designate the authorized signer, who can sign the Contractual Agreement on behalf of the organization.
  • Once you have completed the registration, you will receive an email confirmation.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Here are a few terms used in the grant portal you need to know before submitting your application:

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text:
• Start Date in General Information: Date the work will begin on the overall program
  • Start Date in Delivery Format: The day the live web/online program and/or printed material will begin or launch.
  • End Date in General Information: The day the overall program ends.
  • End Date in Delivery Format: The day the live web/online program and/or printed material will close/expire.
  • Decision Requested by Date: The date you would like to have a decision on your request. We prefer this date be two weeks to two months prior to the start date of the program.

item_2.name: Text Container Text
item_2.text: The grant portal will not allow a program start date to be entered after the 60-day deadline. Please contact the Independent Education Team at abbviegrants@abbvie.com if you require assistance.

item_3.name: Text Container Text
item_3.text: For information and step-by-step assistance with submitting your request, please review the Requestor Training Guide. All informational documents and FAQ's can be found here.

item_4.name: Text Container Text
item_4.text: Once the request has been submitted, you will receive an email confirmation.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: AbbVie carefully considers every grant request. Criteria for awarding a grant includes but is not limited to:

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text:
• Educational strategy
  • Scientific and educational merit
  • Target audience
  • Geographic equity
  • Availability of funds
  • Adequate review time

item_2.name: Text Container Text
item_2.text: We work to ensure that a decision will be made by the "Decision Requested by Date." If you have questions, please contact the Independent Education Team at abbviegrants@abbvie.com. If an application is incomplete or funding type does not match the original request, a Request for Additional Information (RFAI) will be sent to the requestor.

item_3.name: Text Container Text
item_3.text: If not approved, you will be sent an email outlining the reason for denial.

item_4.name: Text Container Text
item_4.text: If approved, you will be sent an email confirmation with instructions to login to the grant portal, review, and electronically sign the contractual agreement.

item_5.name: Text Container Text
item_5.text: The contractual agreement must be signed by all parties, prior to the start date of the event to be considered a fully executed contract. Once signed you will receive an email confirming the payment has been released.

item_6.name: Text Container Text
item_6.text: The payment will come via check or electronic transfer (ACH). Payment address and account information must be provided in the request.

item_7.name: Text Container Text
item_7.text: You will receive the check in regular USPS mail in four to six weeks and the electronic transfer to your account within two to four days.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Reconciliation is required within 90 days after the completion of the program.

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text: Please reference the IME Outcomes Standardization Playbook for our requirements. This can be found on the AbbVie Grants Portal login page.

block.imageAlt: man and woman looking at computer
block.name: Custom Image

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Please contact the Independent Education Team at abbviegrants@abbvie.com if you require assistance.
